title: Monet DB giving wrong value from a table when a value is queried after insertion/ Data Loss
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testtable (dim_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, dim_type TEXT NOT NULL, dim_value TEXT NOT NULL, UNIQUE(dim_type, dim_value));
SELECT dim_id, dim_type, dim_value FROM testtable WHERE dim_type='user' AND dim_value='user1';

CREATE TABLE test (roe_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, roe_type INTEGER NOT NULL, node_event_id INTEGER NOT NULL, dc_servername TEXT, roe_start_date_withtz TEXT, usr_id INTEGER, customgroup_id INTEGER, queuename_id INTEGER, exitstatus_id INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test (roe_type, node_event_id, dc_servername) VALUES (1, 100, 'server1');
key_bug_features: Incorrect value retrieval after data insertion
